title: Freedom
description: The most patriotic mod ever created.
body:
Freedom is a mod I made due to a joke made by RavynousHunter. You can see the joke below. It is based around the fourth of July, freedom, and fried chicken. This mod is not meant to be serious in anyway, and was not intended to be in any modpacks.

> Alas, freedom buckets can only store cheap beer, Mountain Dew, or fried chicken. ...Now, someone needs to add a bucket of fried chicken to Minecraft because awesome.
